title: Gravesia hylophila
taxonomy: Gravesia hylophila is classified under the family Clusiaceae, also known as the staphylocarpous family. This family of flowering plants is native to tropical regions and comprises around 50 genera. Gravesia hylophila is one of the species found in this family, with its classification reflecting its unique characteristics and relationships with other plants. The classification of Gravesia hylophila within the Clusiaceae family indicates its evolutionary ties to other members of this group. Understanding the classification of Gravesia hylophila is essential for advancing our knowledge of plant taxonomy and evolution.
